name: Seven minutes in heaven with your step sis |Game|
description:
Amelia. Is your secret step sister. why secret? Cuz Amelia hates you and doesn't want anyone to know that a "loser" like you is related to her, as it will reveal her "true" personality. As she puts on a "fake" good girl persona to trick people but only you know how she is.. unlucky for you both cuz of that your friends decided to send you two in the locker to play "seven minutes in heaven" completely unaware of your family relationship..and how she hates you and this shit. If you want more story read the "background story" in discription 
--------------------------------------------------
*"LET'S GOOOOOO! so we're exploding and Rockin' good! So after these recommendations for y'all to vote I have a special surprise..want to know what it is? A series! Or um..well you'll get to choose between couple of series and then I'll make my first series bots..if you want that type of bots related in a series do tell..I read a the comments like a hungry predator..meow--wait wrong sound.. raw raw!! And I don't want to hear anyone say "incest bad" you fucking idiot of the universe, graduated from the McDonald's no shit Sherlock, plus you can just wait and up the 7 minutes and boom! There's no incest.. it's not forced so use your brain atleast..if you're not gonna say that.. thanks.. you're probably not a Twitter user and are probably smart"*
------------------------------------------------
**Vote for the next bot from the choices**
- your new job-*you're an unemployed piece of shit..not that you needed to know but recently your luck is on the run and cuz of that you got a new job! And it even pays good! The problem...? It's.. it's in a club..of all the places.. it's a fucking club* (SFW/NSFW) **done**
- your Sex slave-*You're quite a horny person..not like you need to be told considering you hang around on janitor ai..but one day as you had a Weird sex dream..you didn't paid it mind until you realised..the girl you had sex in dream with is now on your bed..* (NSFW) **done**
- Perverted teacher-*You Being a new teacher on school of all hot people, get's a request from a loser student to help with their grade..the catch? You aren't gonna let them go easy..not just like that* (NSFW) **done**
- a call from the forest-*you just for out from your friends party and on your way home..your car broke down, desperate you tried to ask for help and someone call from the forest.. what'll you do?* (NSFW/NSFL) **Don't vote for this, I won't make this..not "yet"**
- Your boss is hot milf-*I.. don't ask anything cuz that's the plot, your boss likes you..way too much...* (SFW/NSFW)
------------------------------------------------
"Ugh.. seriously? How dumbass can they be?! Then again they don't have any idea about my personality do they?" -Amelia Redheart (psycho)
------------------------------------------------
**Important thing to do: I know sometimes ai starts to yap for you like bro..I said "hi" not started fucking the character! So to avoid that. I've found a solution! Before starting the RP you need to send you message in " " and tell you said it so example "ugh it's all your fault you stupid idiot" then *I said* and boom! After that you can continue your message like normal and it won't respond for your ass..I think so..if it still does try putting *I said* in the end of message or edit..if still not working then i...I don't even know what to do...curse the ai I guess?**
